title: Union Schools’ rugby boys compete against Kingswood
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union Schools' rugby boys enjoyed a spirited outing to Kingswood Junior School in Makhanda on Saturday 17 May.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union Schools' rugby boys enjoyed a spirited outing to Kingswood Junior School in Makhanda on Saturday 17 May."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The U9 A and B teams gave it their all in tough matches, losing 5-12 and 5-40 respectively to fit and determined young teams in Makhanda."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The U11 A side delivered an impressive performance, claiming a 34-5 victory, while the U13 B team followed with a strong 38-12 win.","html":"The U11 A side delivered an impressive performance, claiming a 34-5 victory, while the U13 B team followed with a strong 38-12 win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The U13 A team capped off the day with a top performance, showcasing outstanding teamwork to secure a commanding 50-7 triumph.","html":"The U13 A team capped off the day with a top performance, showcasing outstanding teamwork to secure a commanding 50-7 triumph."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All players were extremely proud of games well played.","html":"All players were extremely proud of games well played."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Union Schools’ rugby boys compete against Kingswood
